ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] If you struggle to structure your thoughts, Chat GPT is a valuable tool to give ideas for outlines, types of questions to ask, and more.
[ ] If you struggle to come up with questions to ask about a book, where to find quality sources, or need some help in structuring your thoughts, Chat GPT is a valuable tool.
